text:
Polish <https://docs.freebsd.org/pl/books/handbook/mirrors/index.html#svn-ssl-certificates> exists as 'A.3.2. Root SSL Certificates' under 'Using Subersion'. 

English <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/mirrors/index.html#svn-svnlite> is 'A.3.2. Svnlite'.
